Adaptability.desc: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.

Defiant.desc: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.

Sand Veil.desc: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.

Supreme Overlord.desc: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.

Drought.desc: Summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

Unburden.desc: Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.

Rough Skin.desc: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.

Intimidate.desc: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

Hospitality.desc: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.

Fairy Aura.desc: Strengthens Fairy moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.

Pixilate.desc: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Fairy moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.

Poison Touch.desc: Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokémon upon contact.

Blaze.desc: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

Heatproof.desc: Halves damage from Fire moves and burns.

Cute Charm.desc: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.

Armor Tail.desc: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.

Prankster.desc: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.

Sturdy.desc: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead. Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.

Stamina.desc: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.

Cud Chew.desc: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.

Tough Claws.desc: Strengthens moves that make contact to 1.33× their power.

Drizzle.desc: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

Friend Guard.desc: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.

Multiscale.desc: Halves damage taken from full HP.

Technician.desc: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

Mega Launcher.desc: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.

Stance Change.desc: Changes Aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using King’s Shield.

Toxic Debris.desc: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

Unnerve.desc: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.

Gale Wings.desc: Raises Flying moves' priority by one stage.

Corrosion.desc: This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.

Snow Warning.desc: Summons hail that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

Flame Body.desc: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.

Spicy Spray.desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

White Smoke.desc: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

Thick Fat.desc: Halves damage from Fire and Ice moves.

Marvel Scale.desc: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

Sand Stream.desc: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

Shadow Tag.desc: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.

Competitive.desc: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

Parental Bond.desc: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves. The second hit has half power.

Snow Cloak.desc: Increases evasion to 1.25× during hail. Protects against hail damage.

Water Absorb.desc: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

Scrappy.desc: Lets the Pokémon's Normal and Fighting moves hit Ghost Pokémon.

Sand Rush.desc: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.

Mega Sol.desc: The Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

Speed Boost.desc: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.

Torrent.desc: Strengthens Water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

Opportunist.desc: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.

Overgrow.desc: Strengthens Grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

Mold Breaker.desc: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.

Protean.desc: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.

Queenly Majesty.desc: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.

Sheer Force.desc: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3× their power, but prevents their extra effects.

Swarm.desc: Strengthens Bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

Stalwart.desc: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

Zero to Hero.desc: Transforms into its Hero Form when switching out.

Leaf Guard.desc: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.

Frisk.desc: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.

Flash Fire.desc: Protects against Fire moves. Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.

Weak Armor.desc: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.

Pickpocket.desc: Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.

Infiltrator.desc: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.

Clear Body.desc: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

Steadfast.desc: Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.

Pressure.desc: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.

Water Bubble.desc: Halves damage from Fire moves, doubles damage of Water moves, and prevents burns.

Iron Fist.desc: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.

Illusion.desc: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokémon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.

Unaware.desc: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.

Sand Force.desc: Strengthens Rock, Ground, and Steel moves to 1.3× their power during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.

Magic Guard.desc: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.

Dry Skin.desc: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain. Increases damage from Fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

Magic Bounce.desc: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.

Regenerator.desc: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.

Solar Power.desc: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× but costs 1/8 max HP after each turn during strong sunlight.

Synchronize.desc: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.

Healer.desc: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any major status ailment after each turn.

No Guard.desc: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.

Disguise.desc: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.

Telepathy.desc: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.

Cursed Body.desc: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.

Oblivious.desc: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.

Anger Point.desc: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.

Electromorphosis.desc: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.

Flower Veil.desc: Protects friendly Grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.

Sap Sipper.desc: Absorbs Grass moves, raising Attack one stage.

Static.desc: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.

Symbiosis.desc: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.

Cloud Nine.desc: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.

Berserk.desc: Raises this Pokémon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.

Filter.desc: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

Guts.desc: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

Earth Eater.desc: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.

Natural Cure.desc: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.

Unseen Fist.desc: Contact moves can strike through Protect/Detect.

Justified.desc: Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a Dark move.

Piercing Drill.desc: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves.

Bulletproof.desc: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.

Trace.desc: Copies an opponent's ability upon entering battle.

Magician.desc: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.

Moxie.desc: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.

Merciless.desc: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.

Aroma Veil.desc: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.

Ice Body.desc: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail. Protects against hail damage.

Skill Link.desc: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and Triple Kick to their full length every time.

Lightning Rod.desc: Redirects single-target Electric moves to this Pokémon where possible. Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.

Dragonize.desc: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Rain Dish.desc: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.

Solid Rock.desc: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

Innards Out.desc: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.

Supersweet Syrup.desc: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.

Moody.desc: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.

Wandering Spirit.desc: Swaps abilities with opponents on contact.

Volt Absorb.desc: Absorbs Electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

Quick Feet.desc: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

Mummy.desc: Changes attacking Pokémon's abilities to Mummy on contact.

Hyper Cutter.desc: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.

Aerilate.desc: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Flying moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.

Hydration.desc: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.

Purifying Salt.desc: Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.

Quick Draw.desc: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

Refrigerate.desc: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Ice moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.

Screen Cleaner.desc: Nullifies effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.

Slush Rush.desc: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.

Analytic.desc: Strengthens moves to 1.3× their power when moving last.

Receiver.desc: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.

Strong Jaw.desc: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.

Harvest.desc: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokémon has held no items in the meantime.

Pickup.desc: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items. May also pick up an item after battle.

Hunger Switch.desc: Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode

Gooey.desc: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.
